mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce discount rates applied to equity cash flows, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer demand, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in >60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in retail sales and housing starts indicate a broad contraction in consumer demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint decline periods yield positive 60-day returns in >55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production index values reflect strengthening manufacturing output and supply-side momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02) during financial stress periods or when monetary policy is restrictive.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated federal funds rates combined with high inflation readings force aggressive monetary tightening expectations, compressing equity valuations and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in >65% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Two consecutive quarters of negative real GDP growth confirm a technical recession, triggering risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in >50% of confirmed recession periods.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls signal robust economic activity and corporate earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window or positive returns occur in <45% of rising payroll months.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and retail sales confirms synchronized demand-supply expansion, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO and RSAFS both increase month-over-month
failure_condition: Joint growth periods yield negative 20-day returns in >60% of cases.
